identity.core_philosophy: Functionality is Beauty. Data is the Hero.

typography.installation_method: Import from Google Fonts in index.css

usage_rules.headings: Use Manrope. Tight tracking (-0.02em). Weights: 600/700/800. No Inter.
usage_rules.body: Use Public Sans. Excellent for numbers and tables. Weights: 400/500.
usage_rules.data_tables: Use Public Sans with Tabular Nums (font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums) for alignment.

colors.mode_strategy: Light Mode Primary (Clinical), Dark Mode Secondary (Power User)

primary.description: Deep Royal Blue / Slate 900. Used for Sidebar, Header, Primary Text.

secondary.description: Slate 100. Used for secondary buttons, backgrounds.

accent.description: Sky 500. Used for active states, primary actions, highlights.

layout.container_style: Fluid width with max-w-[1920px] center constraint for ultra-wide screens.
layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind Scale. Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) for containers, tight padding (p-2, p-3) for data cells.
layout.radius: rounded-sm (2px-4px) or rounded-md (6px). Avoid rounded-xl or full pills except for status badges.

structure.sidebar: Fixed left, collapsible (w-64 -> w-16). Dark theme sidebar for contrast.
structure.header: Sticky top, white background, shadow-sm. Contains Global Search & User Profile.
structure.main_content: bg-slate-50 (light gray) to differentiate from white cards.

customization_rules.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-sm). Font-medium. Uppercase text for 'add' actions is allowed but not mandatory.
customization_rules.cards: White bg, shadow-sm, border-slate-200. Optional: Top border colored by status (e.g., border-t-4 border-red-500 for critical alerts).
customization_rules.inputs: bg-white, border-slate-300. Focus: ring-2 ring-sky-100 border-sky-500.
customization_rules.tables: THE HERO COMPONENT. Dense. Sticky header. Row hover: bg-slate-50. Border-b only. Cell padding: py-2 px-4. Header: uppercase text-xs text-slate-500 font-bold tracking-wider.

data_table.style: Clean, tabular-nums, striped rows (optional via prop).

stats_card.style: Simple metric, sparkline (optional), icon in top-right with subtle bg color.

modal.style: Backdrop blur-sm. Sharp corners. Clearly defined header/footer.

visual_enhancers.shadows: Layered shadows. shadow-sm for cards, shadow-md for dropdowns/modals.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly. Only for sticky headers or toasts. backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80.

motion.interaction: Micro-interactions on buttons. Active state scale-95.

icons.library: Lucide React (Default) or Phosphor Icons (for more technical feel)
icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px or 2px. Consistent sizing (w-4 h-4 or w-5 h-5).

images.strategy: Minimal use of photos. Focus on data. Use photos only for Login Page background and User Avatars.

login_background.alt: Abstract Blue and White Pharmaceutical Blister Pack
login_background.style: Cover, overlay with black/50 or blue/90 for text readability.

images.empty_states: Use Lucide Icons in a large circular container with muted bg. No cartoony illustrations.

login.layout: Split screen. Left: Branding/Image. Right: Login Form.

admin_dashboard.layout: Bento Grid. Top: 4-5 KPI Cards. Middle: Transfer Suggestions (Table) + Low Stock Alerts (List). Bottom: Recent Activity.

inventory_master.layout: Full-width Data Table. Filter bar on top (Category, Supplier, Stock Status).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-slate-500 is readable on white. Use text-slate-600 if needed.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-sky-500 on keyboard focus.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS FIRST: Add the Google Fonts link to public/index.html or import in index.css.
CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to use the 'Manrope' and 'Public Sans' font families.
BUILD LAYOUT WRAPPER: Create a DashboardLayout component with Sidebar and Navbar.
TABLE COMPONENT: Do not just use the default Shadcn table. Wrap it in a container with 'overflow-auto' and 'max-h-[calc(100vh-200px)]' for sticky headers.
FORMS: Use Shadcn Form + React Hook Form + Zod. Validate strictly.
MOCK DATA: When backend is not ready, generate realistic pharmacy data (e.g., 'Amoxicillin 500mg', 'Cipla', 'Batch #B123').
TESTING: Add data-testid to all inputs, buttons, and table rows.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, stick to solid colors or subtle patterns.
Avoid centering text in data tables; align numbers to the right, text to the left.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover and active states.
Don't ask the user for clarification; assume the persona of an expert consultant.
